page_metadata.biotools__summary: SymD webserver is a platform for detecting internally symmetric protein structures. It works through an alignment scan procedure in which a protein structure is aligned to itself after circularly permuting the second copy by all possible number of residues.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SymD webserver is a platform for detecting internally symmetric protein structures. It works through an alignment scan procedure in which a protein structure is aligned to itself after circularly permuting the second copy by all possible number of residues.
